2115680.name: Illustris
2115680.description:
Illustris

Explore a human-inhabited starsystem in this action-packed sci-fi Metroidvania.

Pilot your starfighter through a fascinating starsystem, uncover abandoned ruins, and conquer perilous dungeons filled with secrets and danger. Engage in thrilling space battles against powerful enemies, solve physics-based puzzles with your versatile magnetic beam, and collect mysterious artifacts to unlock new abilities and grow stronger with every step.

Liberate Illustris and repel the invaders in a decisive final showdown!
